zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Ferrers於大約1327年出生在英國英格蘭戴文爾斯頓 費雷斯時，她的父親John de Ferrers38歲，母親Elizabeth de Challons30歲。她於1345年與Adam de Copplestone在英國戴文可雷迪頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1380年享年54歲，埋葬在英國戴文。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Ferrers was born about 1327, in Churston Ferrers, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Ferrers, was 38 and her mother, Elizabeth de Challons, was 30. She married Adam de Copplestone in 1345, in Crediton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1380, at the age of 54, and was buried in Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Ferrers est née environ 1327, à Churston Ferrers, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Ferrers, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Challons, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Adam de Copplestone en 1345, à Crediton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1380, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Ferrers um 1327 in Churston Ferrers, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Ferrers 38 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Challons 30. Sie hat 1345 in Crediton, Devon, England Adam de Copplestone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1380 im Alter von 54 Jahren und wurde in Devon, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Ferrersが約1327年にイギリスイギリスデボンチャーストン フエレルズで生まれた時，父John de Ferrersは38歳，母Elizabeth de Challonsは30歳であった。1345年にイギリスデボンクレディトンでAdam de Copplestoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1380年に54歳で死去し，イギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Ferrers(이)가 대략 1327년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 c후르스턴 페레르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Ferrers(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Challons(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1345년 영국 데폰 크레딧에서 Adam de Copplestone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Ferrers родилась около 1327 г. в местности чурстон фиррирс, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Ferrers было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Challons, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam de Copplestone в 1345 г. в местности кредитон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1380 г. в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности девон, Англия.
